claims.claim: Given query vector $q$, key matrix $K$, and value matrix $V$, the standard attention output is: $$y = \text{softmax}(q K^T) V$$ We quantize each value vector $v_i$ to symmetric int4 with a per-vector scale $s_i$: $$\hat{v}_i = s_i \cdot \text{round}(v_i / s_i)$$ where $s_i = \max(|v_i|) / 7$ (for 4-bit symmetric range $[-7, 7]$).
